content.problemStatement:
You are given three **distinct** integers A,B,A, B,A,B, and CCC.

Find **any** integer X (0â‰¤X<230)X \ (0 \leq X < 2^{30})X (0â‰¤X<230) such that:

(AâŠ•X)<(BâŠ•X)<(CâŠ•X)(A \oplus X) \lt (B \oplus X) \lt (C \oplus X)(AâŠ•X)<(BâŠ•X)<(CâŠ•X), where âŠ•\oplusâŠ• denotes the Bitwise XOR operation.

If no such XXX exists, print âˆ’1-1âˆ’1 instead.


Input Format

The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT, the number of test cases.
The first and only line of each test case contains three space-separated integers A,B,A, B,A,B, and CCC.


Output Format
For each test case, output a single integer on a new line, the value of XXX that satisfies the above conditions or âˆ’1-1âˆ’1 if no such XXX exists.


If multiple such XXX satisfy the condition, you may print any.
